summary.content: Product Analyst with 3+ years bridging data science and product strategy. Proven ability to instrument product funnels, design and analyze A/B experiments, define KPI frameworks, and translate behavioral data into actionable product decisions. Experience embedded in early-stage product teams as a founding engineer and in cross-functional consulting engagements, with a track record of directly informing roadmap priorities through rigorous experimentation and user behavior analysis.

experience.title: Founding Engineer, Data and AI Applications
experience.company: Alphonso AI, Shipley Center for Innovation
bullets: Instrumented product funnels on MVP session data and translated drop-off analysis into prioritized UI/UX redesign recommendations, directly shaping feature decisions before product launch.
Built engagement-scoring models and search quality metrics for a hybrid retrieval system (Dense Vector + BM25), achieving 38% improvement in search precision through iterative experimentation.
Established drift monitoring in Grafana and automated feature engineering pipelines via AWS (S3, Glue), creating the measurement infrastructure needed for continuous product improvement.

experience.title: Graduate Equity Research Analyst
experience.company: Student Managed Investment Fund, Clarkson University
bullets: Automated financial data extraction via the SEC EDGAR API and Google Vertex AI, reducing manual research time by 40% and enabling structured analytical workflows for DCF and WACC modeling.
Architected Tableau dashboards for fund performance attribution and volatility tracking, integrating LLM-driven earnings-call summaries to streamline reporting for 8 analysts.
Co-managed a $650K portfolio delivering 51% total return, outperforming the S&P 500 by 2,600 bps, with data-informed position sizing supported by Monte Carlo and risk-parity models.

experience.title: Data Science Consultant
bullets: Designed and analyzed A/B experiments for dynamic ticket-pricing strategies; applied Power Analysis to determine sample sizes and validated a statistically significant 12% revenue-per-ticket improvement.
Applied Uplift Modeling (CausalML) to segment fans by persuadability, enabling data-driven targeting that replaced heuristic rules and demonstrably optimized incremental marketing spend.
Built behavioral clustering models on purchase and engagement features to create personalized campaign cohorts; refactored PySpark ETL pipelines processing 1M+ events to reduce data latency by 30%.

experience.title: Business Data Analyst
bullets: Deployed automated KPI dashboards in Oracle Analytics Cloud, eliminating 12+ hours per week of manual reporting and enabling self-serve analytics for the procurement team.
Analyzed approximately 800K daily Oracle ERP transaction records to deliver supply chain insights that improved demand-forecast accuracy by 15% MAPE across 1,500+ SKUs.
Maintained GxP-compliant data workflows on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure with real-time alerting, achieving 99.9% uptime for critical operational dashboards.

experience.title: Data Analyst
bullets: Integrated 10M+ rows from 30+ heterogeneous panel and survey sources using PySpark and Databricks, reducing data latency by 40% and enabling consistent stakeholder reporting.
Designed sampling frameworks and applied regression models to generate representative consumer insights for 10+ FMCG and Telecom clients, informing multi-million-dollar campaign strategies.
Produced Power BI dashboards for 10+ stakeholders enabling self-serve access to campaign performance metrics and go-to-market investment tracking.
